scope: FQ-09U1: seamless state-driven context music using full-mix loops only - the hybrid adaptive score's horizontal layer - with every threshold, fade, and normalization data-defined, zero gameplay/save coupling, and silent-safe missing-asset behavior. Gated work: proceeded only after operator listening approval and an in-lane Godot 4.6 spike.
summary: The adaptive score is live. One AudioStreamInteractive carries the four context clips (surface_day, surface_night, underground, crisis) built from the operator-approved 72 BPM / 4-4 / 16-bar suite; transitions are registered any->clip as next-bar + same-position + one-bar crossfade, with crisis entry escalating to next-beat - the exact mechanism the storyboard of the music program called for, proven live by fq09u1_live_clip_switch (AudioStreamPlaybackInteractive.get_current_clip_index reaches the requested clip during real playback). The AdaptiveMusicDirector polls existing game truth every 0.5s (is_night, storm_active, current_threat_severity, player health ratio, the cave-spawn underground rule) and caches settlement load from the 5s updated signal; pressure = max(threat/40, load/100, inverse health) + 0.15 storm bonus, clamped; priority crisis > underground > surface_night > surface_day; crisis needs 0.60 sustained 2s to enter and 0.35 sustained 6s to leave; a one-bar minimum hold and a never-re-request rule stop churn. The state machine core is a deterministic evaluate(state, delta) that the smoke drives with synthetic snapshots - no wall-clock dependence anywhere in the checks. The manifest loader is standalone (no BlockRegistry service-locator creep) and loads OGGs at runtime with no import pass, stamping the musical grid per stream. Missing or broken assets disable audio with a warning while the state machine keeps evaluating; music state is transient and save round-trips carry zero music keys. The Music bus is created at runtime only if absent. LayerPlayer and StingerPlayer ship as reserved children for U2/U3.
acceptance: Daytime -> surface_day, forced night -> surface_night, dawn -> back, underground -> underground (fq09u1_context_resolution)
Sustained pressure enters crisis; brief threshold crossings never do; exit requires the lower threshold AND the delay (fq09u1_crisis_enter_hysteresis, fq09u1_crisis_exit_delay)
Identical state evaluations never restart or re-request the current/pending clip (fq09u1_no_rerequest)
A next-bar same-position crossfade genuinely reaches the requested clip in live playback (fq09u1_live_clip_switch - the spike's behavior proof)
Missing audio assets never crash: audio disables silently, the state machine keeps working (fq09u1_missing_assets_silent_safe)
Music state is absent from saved world data and the director survives a load (fq09u1_state_not_saved)
Manifest grid and stream metadata verified (fq09u1_manifest_and_streams); director live on the Music bus (fq09u1_director_live)
All existing checks stay green: suite 226/226; validator, capsule doctor, git diff --check clean
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. director script/scene, manifest loader, four context OGGs, m8patch, Codex tooling
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 226/226 PASS at 2026-07-10T17:30:28
haiku read-only verifier -> NO FINDINGS (9/9 items)
decisions: The spike was executed in-lane when the Codex lane had not delivered it - its purpose is proving behavior before building, and both halves are recorded: a ClassDB probe of the exact binary (API surface, constants) and a live in-smoke clip-switch proof; the Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting question stays open BY DESIGN as FQ-09U2's mandatory first step

Polling (0.5s) + the existing settlement signal covered every U1 input, so the sanctioned narrow game_root event surface was not needed at all - game_root is untouched by code, only the scene gained a node
A dedicated manifest loader instead of BlockRegistry - the music system must not turn the block registry into a service locator
OGGs load at runtime (AudioStreamOggVorbis.load_from_file) matching the repo's no-import rule; the musical grid is stamped in code from the manifest so the assets themselves stay plain files
debug_reset is a test-only hard reset (never called by gameplay); every smoke state-machine check runs from a clean baseline through the deterministic evaluate(state, delta) core
Music state is transient by construction: no serializer knows it exists
Swarm: lead implementation with in-lane spike, 1 haiku read-only diff verifier (scouts unneeded - the game-truth surface was verified in the FQ-09U0 run)
risks: Transition feel (fade lengths, crisis next-beat abruptness) is play-tunable via the manifest; only listening during play will settle it
Context changes can lag real state by up to the 0.5s poll before bar quantization begins - imperceptible, documented
U2's stem design depends on the unresolved nesting spike (fallback: a parallel synchronized LayerPlayer mixed alongside the context stream)
Volume settings and pause behavior are deliberately U3
next_action: FQ-09U2: settlement-responsive stem layering, opening with the Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting spike.
